items.title: Expansion of U.S. Manufacturing and Tezspire Approval Might Change the Case for Investing in Amgen (AMGN)
items.description: Amgen recently announced a US$650 million expansion of its U.S. manufacturing network, including upgrades at its Juncos facility and nearly 750 new jobs, while its co-developed medicine Tezspire received a positive recommendation in the EU for treating chronic rhinosinusitis with nasal polyps based on successful phase 3 trial results. The manufacturing investment and regulatory progress for Tezspire point to Amgen's ongoing efforts to strengthen domestic production and expand its reach in...

items.title: Regeneron: Strong R&D Pipeline Drives Growth Outlook
items.description: Regeneron remains a 'Strong Buy' amid investor concerns and strong drug performances. Read here for more financial analysis of REGN stock.

items.title: AbbVie For Healthy Dividend Growth
items.description: AbbVie combines strong earnings, rising dividends, and growth from Skyrizi and Rinvoq, making it a top dividend pick. Read why ABBV stock is a strong buy.
